title: bus.hearth.session.permission.requested v1
description: Emitted by hearth-session's permission_publisher when a Claude Code permission prompt is detected on a tmux pane. Published with a 300-second TTL and 10-second dedup window. The Android app renders an Approve/Deny card and fires a push notification; the response is routed back to the correct tmux pane via correlation_id. Auto-mode sessions (permission_mode=acceptEdits|bypassPermissions) are never published.

correlation_id.description: UUID v4 token that identifies this permission prompt; the Android app echoes it back on approval/denial so hearth-api can route the keystroke to the correct pane.

session_id.description: ULID of the hearth-session this prompt belongs to.

pane_id.description: tmux pane ID the prompt appeared in (e.g. '%42').

project.description: Absolute path of the project this session is running in.

project_short.description: Short project name derived from the project path.

tool_summary.description: Truncated one-line description of the tool being gated (first line of tool description, max 120 chars).

prompt_text.description: Full prompt text up to 600 characters, used as the card body on the phone UI.

options.description: Option labels from the Claude Code permission prompt (e.g. ['Yes', 'Yes, and don't ask again for this session', 'No']).

deep_link.description: session:// URI that links directly to this session in the app.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when this event was published.

expires_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp after which the phone should auto-dismiss this card.
